# Post-COVID conditions response: a collaborative approach to ­establishing multidisciplinary clinics in Ecuador

We are pleased to announce that we have implemented a new plugin for our journal, which will track citations from Scopus, Google Scholar, Crossref, and Europe PMC. This will allow authors to easily see how many times their work has been cited in these databases. Europe PMC also serves as a search engine and directly links to the work as indexed on PubMed and PubMedCentral, providing additional visibility. The plugin widget (see below) can be found at the bottom of each published work, and by clicking on the database symbols, authors can view the citation numbers.

enriched_points.expanded_content: Effective rehabilitation relies on collaboration among diverse healthcare professionals, including physicians, therapists, and psychologists, ensuring comprehensive care tailored to individual patient needs.

Integrating services across specialties allows for seamless patient experiences, addressing various aspects of post-COVID recovery, from physical rehabilitation to mental health support and nutritional guidance.

A holistic care model prioritizes the overall well-being of patients, considering physical, emotional, and social factors, fostering a supportive environment conducive to recovery and long-term health.
